author: gb9t
content:
Q1-Q6 resolved (user direction 2026-05-09): accept all recommendations EXCEPT escalate Q4.

Resolutions in 00-overview.md as section 'Resolved Decisions' (D1-D6):

- D1 (baseline pinning): pin to next stable tag (7.1 final or 7.2); rebaseline at each LTS or every 2 stable releases, whichever sooner. Per-doc baseline-commit frontmatter detects staleness mechanically.
- D2 (module ABI): recompile-from-source compat only. Strict CONFIG_MODVERSIONS binary compat → out of scope for v0.
- D3 (driver coverage): tier-4 docs are PER CLASS plus per BUS. Per-driver docs only for v0 port set: virtio-blk, virtio-net, virtio-console, e1000e, ahci, ehci/xhci, ps2-keyboard, hid-input, vt console.
- D4 (verification — ESCALATED): formal verification IS the baseline. Every unsafe block ships a Kani-checkable SAFETY proof. Concurrency primitives ship TLA+ models with safety+liveness invariants. Critical data-structure invariants are Kani-checked. Functional correctness via Creusot/Verus/Prusti is per-subsystem opt-in. Per-subsystem docs may declare more demanding verification, none may declare less.
- D5 (kexec): byte-identical hand-off required. Spec lands in arch/x86/boot.md tier-3 doc.
- D6 (security): defer 00-security-principles.md until after Phase A + mm/00-overview + arch/x86/00-overview. Tracked on issue #2.

Doc changes:
- Foundational Decisions table grew from 4 to 10 rows
- REQ count 12 → 15 (added REQ-13 verification baseline, REQ-14 driver tiering, REQ-15 kexec parity)
- AC count 10 → 15 (matching ACs for REQ-13/14/15)
- New 'Verification stack' subsection in Architecture (4-layer: Kani SAFETY proofs / TLA+ concurrency / Kani DS invariants / opt-in Creusot-Verus-Prusti functional)
- Quality-gate criterion added: 'Verification section unpopulated → cannot graduate'
- Out of Scope grew with v0 deferrals for binary modversion compat and per-driver long-tail docs

D4 escalation has follow-on impact on 00-rust-conventions.md (must name Kani as baseline verifier and document the per-tool integration points) and on every subsequent subsystem doc (Verification section becomes mandatory). Adjusting Phase B plan accordingly.
